overview: Luxury 3D-animated portfolio website for Charmi Patel, a professional makeup artist in Ahmedabad who works with celebrities. Features a full dark-pink theme, immersive 3D particle animations, gallery of 12 real portfolio photos, services showcase, celebrity testimonials, client reviews, FAQ, maps, and floating WhatsApp/Instagram action buttons.
features: Hero with 3D animated particle background and portfolio photos
Full services showcase: Bridal, HD, Airbrush, Party, Pre-Wedding, Celebrity Makeup
Gallery of 12 real portfolio photos with 3D hover effects
Celebrity testimonials section with animated cards
Why Choose Us with animated 3D cards
Luxury dark-pink pinkish theme with blurry glow effects
